original_statement: what is the total number of wins for 2001-2003?
mutated_statement: what is the total number of something for those years?
mutation_analysis: [Metric generalization] + [Temporal generalization]: 'wins' (specific statistic) → 'something' (vague/unspecified noun) | '2001-2003' (explicit year range) → 'those years' (anaphoric/vague temporal reference)

behavior_analysis.behavior_category: 意识到目标模糊，猜测目标
behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 从judge_thought中识别出的关键信息是“ The most reasonable interpretation of “total number of something for those years” is the total wins across the listed years.”，以及计算并得出总和68的说明。Agent在日志中并未直接拒绝或要求澄清，而是明确指出采用了“最合理的解释”并据此对“something”和“those years”作出具体假设（即把something解释为wins，把those years解释为2001–2010），随后执行求和并给出具体答案。该行为符合“意识到模糊但进行推测”的特征：既表明了问题存在多种理解可能性，又在缺乏进一步澄清的情况下主动假定目标并提供了具体结果，因此归类为“意识到目标模糊，猜测目标”。
